name: Peppermint Kisses
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat egg whites until foamy.
2. Add salt and cream of tartar; beat until soft peaks form.
3. Beat in sugar, 1 tablespoon at a time, until stiff and glossy.
4. Spoon meringue into a pastry bag or resealable plastic bag.
5. If using a plastic bag, cut a 1-inch hole in the corner.
6. Squeeze 1-1/2 inches of meringue onto greased foil-lined baking sheets.
7. Sprinkle half with red crushed candy canes and half with green candy canes.
8. Bake at 225 degrees for 1-1/2 to 2 hours or until dry but not brown.
9. Cool; remove from foil.
10. Store in an airtight container.
